I just got this new Aristocrat suitcase and wanted to share my first impressions. I went for the large size, and it's even better in person than I expected.

First off, I love the look of it. It's a dark navy blue with this cool, almost geometric texture on the hard shell. But what really makes it stand out are the bright yellow accents. They've got the yellow on the wheels and the piping around the zippers, and it just looks so sharp and modern. Plus, it's going to be so easy to spot on the luggage conveyor belt.

This large-size luggage bag is really good for the price. The quality is strong and durable, and it has enough space to carry all travel essentials easily. The wheels move smoothly, and the handle is comfortable to use. It looks stylish and premium, much better than expected at this price range. Overall, its totally value for money. I really love it and would definitely recommend it to others.

Bought this dark blue American Tourister backpack for Rs. 999, mainly for office and travel. Chose dark blue so it wouldnt show dirt easily over time. The bag is spacious with three main compartmentsperfect for daily use. The material seems strong, and the look is impressive. Planning to use it for rough and tough purposes; hoping it proves durable in the long run. So far, the quality feels good but need time to confirm its lasting performance.

Just 8 to 9 months and front pocket chain gone completely and can't use this pocket anymore. And chains for rest of the two main pockets are also corrupted and can fail anytime. Rest of the things are ok, you won't feel any premiumness in this project. Just a basic bag with AT tag.
It's not for corporate office use but for any general office.
